titleZh: 公司法修订系列解读——资本充实原则及股东出资责任
titleEn: Company Law Revision Series: Capital Maintenance and Shareholder Contribution Liability
abstractZh: 聚焦资本充实原则、实缴期限、出资责任与对债权人保护规则的变化，适合作为注册资本和出资专题的实务入口。
abstractEn: Explains how the revised Company Law strengthens capital maintenance, contribution timing, shareholder liability, and creditor-protection rules.
